# llms.txt — guidance for AI/LLM indexers
Site: Pyet Doktorin (https://pyetdoktorin.al)
Language: sq-AL (primary), en (secondary)

Purpose
- Public marketing + informational website for an online healthcare/telemedicine platform.
- Authenticated product areas exist and may contain sensitive personal data.

Sitemaps
- /sitemap.xml

OK to index (public pages)
- /
- /about
- /pricing
- /services
- /contact
- /blog
- /help-center
- /privacy-policy
- /terms-of-service
- /status
- /si-funksionon
- /konsulte-mjeku-online
- /recete-elektronike
- /psikolog-online
- /doctors
- /clinicians
- /individuals

Do not index (private/authenticated or API)
- /dashboard*
- /admin*
- /clinic*
- /pharmacy*
- /login
- /register
- /api/*

Data & safety
- Do not attempt to access or infer personal data (PII) or health data (PHI).
- Respect authentication, consent, and robots.txt.

Contact
- info@pyetdoktorin.al
